title: health_endpoint_should_return_200_and_status_indicators
description: Verify that the GET /health and GET /api/health endpoints respond with HTTP status 200 and include indicators for system operational status, database connectivity, event store initialization, and core engine availability.

title: order_creation_should_initialize_open_state
description: Test that a new order can be created via POST /api/orders and that the order is initialized in the OPEN state with no items and zero total.

title: order_items_can_be_added_to_open_order
description: Verify that items can be added to an existing order in the OPEN state using PATCH /api/orders/{orderId}, and that the order total updates accordingly.

title: order_can_be_locked_and_total_becomes_immutable
description: Test that an order can be transitioned from OPEN to LOCKED state, the total is calculated correctly at locking, and that no further modifications to the order items or total are allowed after locking.

title: locked_order_cannot_be_modified
description: Verify that attempts to modify an order in the LOCKED state via PATCH /api/orders/{orderId} are rejected with appropriate error responses.

title: order_can_be_closed_successfully
description: Test that an order in the PAID state can be closed using POST /api/orders/{orderId}/close and that the order state transitions to CLOSED.
